all_candidates.title: The Hell Of The North Is Finally Back! | 2021 Paris-Roubaix Preview Show
BRUTAL! 😮 2021 Paris-Roubaix vibes, anyone? Paris-Tours serving up challenging conditions! 🌧️
How good was the 2021 edition of Paris-Roubaix where Sonny Colbrelli delivered the emotion! 🔥

transcript.clean_text: the wait was finally over the one hundred and eighteenth pahiru bay would take place two and a half years after the 117th edition and 19 years after the last reign fell on the race starting in kompien the 257 kilometer event would take on 30 cobbled sectors beginning in 12 with those three famous sectors the arenberg being the big headline names 55 kilometers on the stones the game of stones under the reign in the mud before that final lap and a half of the concrete velodrome to finish in hubert the fourth monument of this rearranged season having a date change to october the rainy weather turned up for the first time in almost 20 years pachikube 2021 whatever happened would go down in history and the race would live up to all of the weight and expectation it was worth the wait the mud the epic atmosphere and the nerve since the start after 100 kilometers of racing we had a group of 31 riders up the road some riders could have been forgiven for wishing they brought their swimming trunks that group of 31 was slowly whittled down four up the road with quite a few of the 60 debutants involved peter sagan a former winner of the race will be the first big name to crash out he'd get on back on his bike but we wouldn't really see him involved in the action again the crashes i'm afraid would continue part of the race part of the problem part of getting over the obstacles on this particular day in the famous ironburg trench with two riders up the road two debutants in irkov and vermesh behind are the more experienced riders caught up in crashes including the belgian champion wildfire knight with 80 kilometers to go fermish would be caught icoff reeled him with him chasing behind matchup on the pool with gianni moscone about to take the lead at the front amateur fonder pool would attack accelerate and make yet another move to get up to the next group he'd join up with colbrellian company then they're still in the game here and behind the watford art group would struggle as correct former winner in the early breakaway would still be involved this crash though would take him out of the front group max five shy going down there meanwhile at the front out of traffic out of danger but riding a sterling race johnny moscon looking to become the first italian winner in 22 years he left behind his companions who've been up the front with him and he was looking good with over a minute of a gap before a back wheel puncture meant that he'd need a bike change the mechanics did a great job a speedy change a calm atmosphere and moscon was still in the running with about a 45 second gap that was until that happened a crash this time he would need a miracle gap down to 20 seconds and reducing his bike still bobbling over the cobbles on the moment mature von de pool florian vermeuch and sonny colbrelli called him then colbrelli would attack moscow this time was unable to follow fonder pool and vermice both fellow debutants alongside colbrelli would after cafford there were three riders remaining the famous velodrome awaited they come in to take the one and a half laps on the concrete concrete that dried out with the wind blowing after the rain had stopped the bell ringing and everybody looking to find a pool fermi went away and tried to attack on turn three thunder pool having a work to come from the outside colbrelli able to go through the center the italian coming through and in a year he won the italian championship the european championship he'd also win a monument would be going home to italy for the first time in 22 years 1999 andrea taffy 2021 sonny colbrelli an outpouring of emotion so much joy after all the drama all the mud all the exertion this is what sport is about an image for the ages is called bradley one for fed merch finished second and mature fonder pool ended in third moscon finishing the day in fourth a fifth place for the current quick steps eve lombard with laporte fanart vanaspruc guava and housler all rounding out a warrior-like top ten the stone lifted by sonny colbrelli bahrain victorious winning the race for the first time and just the fourth time of asking colbrelli at the first on debut the best after a day that we will not forget for a long long time two and a half years for the men 125 years for the women on both occasions on a bumper weekend it was worth the wait
transcript.preview_start: the wait was finally over the one hundred and eighteenth pahiru bay would take place two and a half years after the 117th edition and 19 years after the last reign fell on the race starting in kompien the 257 kilometer event would take on 30 cobbled sectors beginning in 12 with those three famous sectors the arenberg being the big headline names 55 kilometers on the stones the game of stones under the reign in the mud before that final lap and a half of the concrete velodrome to finish in hubert
transcript.preview_end: the day in fourth a fifth place for the current quick steps eve lombard with laporte fanart vanaspruc guava and housler all rounding out a warrior-like top ten the stone lifted by sonny colbrelli bahrain victorious winning the race for the first time and just the fourth time of asking colbrelli at the first on debut the best after a day that we will not forget for a long long time two and a half years for the men 125 years for the women on both occasions on a bumper weekend it was worth the wait
